{
  "claims": [
    "California faces a budget deficit that impacts funding for various initiatives.",
    "A funding package of more than $15 billion will include community care assistance, $750 million for encampment cleanup, and $2.2 billion for behavioral health.",
    "Fentanyl use is increasing among all populations, including young people.",
    "Schools are taking steps to provide Narcan to help prevent overdose deaths on campuses.",
    "$3.5 million allocated by the governor will help schools fund the provision of Narcan.",
    "Another $4 million is allocated for test strips to check for fentanyl contamination in other drugs.",
    "California provides $4.2 billion in grants, more than $1 billion in small business credits, and $2.1 billion for workforce development to support small businesses."
  ]
}
